title: JuveCourt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''JuveCourt''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] penal system that dealt with young offenders. Those found guilty could be sentenced to [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
